glossaryEntries.definition: Tactical Damage is increased by the attacker's Instinct and mitigated by the target's Intelligence.
Restores troops to the target. Recovery amount scales with dragon Level and is enhanced by Instinct.

abilities.name: Warden's Rally
abilities.rawDescription:
Rounds 2, 4, 7, 9: Deal Tactical Damage to 1 Enemy in the same lane (Damage Rate: +100%).

Rounds 3, 6, 9: Apply Recovery to 3 Allies in any lane (Recovery Rate: +70%, enhanced by Instinct).

notes: Mitigated by target Intelligence
Manual combat-log observation confirms that 3 Allies includes Malachite as the caster in the three-dragon formation.

unresolvedQuestions: Exact Level and Instinct scaling formulas.

verification.source: Warden's Rally summary and glossary screenshots

abilities.name: Sentinel's Presence
abilities.rawDescription: At Level 16+ and deployed in the Vanguard Increase your Recovery Dealt by +15% and Instinct by +25. Increase Fire Damage Dealt by +16% of the Ally deployed in the Left Flank.

abilities.name: Forest's Instinct
abilities.rawDescription: Each Round: 35% chance to increase the Physical Damage Dealt (excluding Basic Attacks) by +8% and reduce the Tactical Damage Received by -8% of 2 other Allies in any lane for 2 round(s).

abilities.name: Wise Vigor
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat: Increase your Instinct by +20% and Recovery Dealt by +20% until the end of combat.

abilities.name: Thunderous Roar
abilities.rawDescription: Each Round: 10% chance to grant Advantage (+20%) to 2 other Allies in any lane for 2 round(s). Advantage increases the target's Damage Dealt.

notes: Advantage increases the target Damage Dealt. Magnitude is fixed in supplied table.

abilities.name: Collective Might
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat: Increase Strength by +12.5% (enhanced by Strength) of 3 Allies in any lane until the end of combat.

notes: Exact 3 Allies targeting is normalized to all three friendly dragons and includes the caster.

glossaryEntries.definition: Causes the target to act before all other combatants each round.
Grants the target a second Basic Attack each round.

abilities.name: Lightning Strike
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Round 1: 40% chance to grant First-Strike, Double-Strike, and increase Strength by +25% (enhanced by Instinct) of 1 other Ally within adjacency for 3 round(s).

notes: Mitigated by target Intelligence
Manual combat-log observation confirms that 3 Allies includes Malachite as the caster in the three-dragon formation.
Advantage increases the target Damage Dealt. Magnitude is fixed in supplied table.
Exact 3 Allies targeting is normalized to all three friendly dragons and includes the caster.

evidenceReferences.description: Manual combat-log observation by the repository owner. Raw combat log has not yet been archived in the repository. Observation: Malachite appeared as a recipient of Warden's Rally Recovery, confirming that "3 Allies" includes the caster for this effect.
evidenceReferences.title: Warden's Rally Recovery included Malachite

evidenceReferences.description: Repeated manual ability-text review confirms that Other Ally and Other Allies exclude the caster, while plain Ally and Allies allow the caster to be selected when spatial targeting rules permit it.
evidenceReferences.title: Ally and Other Ally targeting-language convention

habits.name: Lightning Strike
habits.rawDescription: Start of Round 1: 40% chance to grant First-Strike, Double-Strike, and increase Strength by +25% (enhanced by Instinct) of 1 other Ally within adjacency for 3 round(s).

notes: Warden's Rally data matches manual in-game observation.
Combat logs showed Warden's Rally applying Recovery to Malachite itself.
This confirms that the exact "3 Allies" target includes the caster for this effect.
Sentinel's Presence transcription and normalization match manual review.
All five Malachite Habits match manual in-game observation.
Warden's Rally Recovery selected Malachite as a recipient in combat logs.
Repeated manual ability-text review confirms that Other Ally and Other Allies exclude the caster.
Plain Ally and Allies allow the caster to be selected when otherwise eligible.
Spatial targeting still controls eligibility; a caster is not adjacent to itself.
Requires Dragon Level 16+.
Unlocked in observed account collection state, subject to level and star requirements.

rawDescriptions.rawDescription:
Rounds 2, 4, 7, 9: Deal Tactical Damage to 1 Enemy in the same lane (Damage Rate: +100%).

Rounds 3, 6, 9: Apply Recovery to 3 Allies in any lane (Recovery Rate: +70%, enhanced by Instinct).
At Level 16+ and deployed in the Vanguard Increase your Recovery Dealt by +15% and Instinct by +25. Increase Fire Damage Dealt by +16% of the Ally deployed in the Left Flank.
Each Round: 35% chance to increase the Physical Damage Dealt (excluding Basic Attacks) by +8% and reduce the Tactical Damage Received by -8% of 2 other Allies in any lane for 2 round(s).

Each Round: 10% chance to grant Advantage (+20%) to 2 other Allies in any lane for 2 round(s). Advantage increases the target's Damage Dealt.
Start of Combat: Increase Strength by +12.5% (enhanced by Strength) of 3 Allies in any lane until the end of combat.
Start of Round 1: 40% chance to grant First-Strike, Double-Strike, and increase Strength by +25% (enhanced by Instinct) of 1 other Ally within adjacency for 3 round(s).
